name: form-reactory-new-form-input
description: Input form for creating a new Reactory form

name.title: Form Name
name.description: Provide a form name that does not contain any spaces, or special characters i.e. MyNewFormName

nameSpace.title: Form Name Space
nameSpace.description: Provide a namespace for the form, default will be form

version.title: Form Version
version.description: Provide a version number for your form

storage.title: Form Storage
storage.description: Decide where you want to store your form
